red team.name: red team
red team.label: Red Team / Offensive Security
red team.description: Adversary emulation, penetration testing, exploitation, C2 operations, evasion

blue team.name: blue team
blue team.label: Blue Team / Defensive Security
blue team.description: Detection engineering, SOC operations, threat hunting, defence architecture, IR

purple team.name: purple team
purple team.label: Purple Team / Collaborative Security
purple team.description: Attack validation, detection coverage assessment, adversary emulation exercises

dfir.name: dfir
dfir.label: DFIR / Digital Forensics & Incident Response
dfir.description: Forensic analysis, incident command, malware triage, timeline reconstruction, e-discovery

threat intelligence.name: threat intelligence
threat intelligence.label: Threat Intelligence / CTI
threat intelligence.description: Threat research, TTP mapping, IoC extraction, threat actor profiling, intelligence tradecraft

cloud security.name: cloud security
cloud security.label: Cloud Security / CloudSec
cloud security.description: AWS/Azure/GCP security, IAM hardening, container security, serverless, Kubernetes

appsec.name: appsec
appsec.label: Application Security / AppSec
appsec.description: SAST/DAST, secure code review, threat modelling, SSDLC, supply chain security

network security.name: network security
network security.label: Network Security / NetSec
network security.description: Network architecture, firewall policy, segmentation, protocol analysis, zero trust

governance.name: governance
governance.label: Governance / GRC
governance.description: Compliance, policy, risk management, audit, regulatory frameworks, third-party risk

security explorer.name: security explorer
security explorer.label: Security Explorer / Research
security explorer.description: Vulnerability research, reverse engineering, tool discovery, CTF, experimental security

universal.name: universal
universal.label: Universal / All-in-One
universal.description: Balanced red + blue + purple + DFIR + threat intel + cloud + appsec + network sec + governance + security exploration
